company_name_en: Hitachi Chemical Co., Ltd. (now Showa Denko Materials / Resonac)
notes: Hitachi Chemical was acquired by Showa Denko (now Resonac Holdings) in 2020, completed integration in 2023. Now operates as Resonac's semiconductor materials division.

business_segments.name: Semiconductor Materials
business_segments.description: ABF (Ajinomoto Build-up Film), semiconductor encapsulants, CMP slurries

business_segments.name: Advanced Materials
business_segments.description: Battery materials, display materials, automotive materials

abf_ic_substrate_activity.abf_role: Hitachi Chemical (now Resonac) is a key supplier of build-up film materials used in ABF substrates. The company supplies dielectric materials and build-up films to IC substrate manufacturers.
abf_ic_substrate_activity.abf_market_leader: Ajinomoto holds ~60% of ABF film market; Hitachi Chemical/Resonac is #2 with ~15%
materials_supplied: Build-up film (dielectric layers for IC substrates)
Epoxy molding compounds for semiconductor packaging
abf_ic_substrate_activity.capacity_expansion: Expanding build-up film production capacity in Japan and Taiwan to meet AI chip substrate demand

market_data.notes: Company delisted after Resonac acquisition. Financial data now consolidated into Resonac Holdings (4004.T).

strengths: Key ABF material supplier (#2 market position)
Long-standing relationships with IC substrate makers
weaknesses: Significantly smaller ABF share than Ajinomoto (~15% vs ~60%)
opportunities: ABF substrate demand boom from AI chips
Capacity expansion to capture unmet demand
New material development for advanced substrates
threats: New entrants in ABF materials (Chinese suppliers)

abf_relevance.notes: Very high ABF relevance - key build-up film material supplier

data_completeness.notes: Delisted company, limited financial data available

source_quality.notes: T3 - training knowledge only, website DNS failed

financial_data.notes: Delisted 2023, no current stock data, parent company data partial

market_position.notes: Clear #2 in ABF materials but details limited

review.decision_reason: Score 62 >= 60 threshold. Hitachi Chemical/Resonac is a critical ABF material supplier but company delisting limits data availability.
